summary: Trade condition/photo requirements and Discogs ISO search - ALL TESTS PASSED (8 backend + all frontend flows). ProposeTradeModal shows 7 condition pills and photo upload (both required). TradeDetailModal displays offered_condition and offered_photo_urls in THE EXCHANGE section. ComposerBar ISO modal has Discogs search with results, manual entry fallback, and Change button after selection. ISOPage listing modal for trades requires condition and photos.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/trades response includes offered_condition and offered_photo_urls fields
Backend: GET /api/trades/{trade_id} detail includes all condition/photo fields for both offered and listing records
Backend: Trade listings include condition and photo_urls fields
Backend: POST /api/listings validates photo_urls requirement (min 1 photo)
Backend: POST /api/trades accepts offered_condition and offered_photo_urls in proposal
Backend: GET /api/discogs/search returns results for album searches
Backend: Discogs search handles empty query appropriately
Backend: POST /api/composer/iso accepts discogs_id, cover_url, year from Discogs data
Frontend: Login flow works with demo@example.com / password123
Frontend: ProposeTradeModal shows condition pills (Mint, Near Mint, Very Good Plus, Very Good, Good Plus, Good, Fair)
Frontend: ProposeTradeModal has photo upload button with 0/5 indicator
Frontend: ProposeTradeModal 'Propose Trade' button disabled until record, condition, and photo selected
Frontend: ProposeTradeModal button remains disabled after selecting record only
Frontend: ProposeTradeModal button remains disabled after selecting record + condition (no photos)
Frontend: ComposerBar ISO modal has Discogs search input (data-testid='iso-discogs-search')
Frontend: ISO modal shows search results with album art (8 results for 'pink floyd dark side')
Frontend: ISO modal 'Or enter manually' button present for fallback
Frontend: ISO modal after selecting release shows album with art and 'Change' button
Frontend: ISO modal shows remaining form fields (budget, caption, submit) after selection
Frontend: ISOPage listing modal for Trade tab has Discogs search
Frontend: ISOPage listing modal has condition select dropdown
Frontend: ISOPage listing modal has photo upload with '(1-10 required)' label
Frontend: ISOPage listing modal submit button disabled until all requirements met
Frontend: TradeDetailModal THE EXCHANGE section displays offered_condition and listing_record.condition as badges
Frontend: TradeDetailModal RecordDetail component shows photoUrls as images
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing demo user and trade/listing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade condition and photo features fully working. ProposeTradeModal (in TradesPage.js ~line 711) has OFFER_CONDITIONS array with 7 conditions. Condition pills have data-testid='offer-condition-{kebab-case}'. Photo upload has data-testid='add-offer-photo-btn'. Submit button data-testid='trade-propose-btn' is disabled until record + condition + photos selected. TradeDetailModal RecordDetail component (line 687) receives condition and photoUrls props. ComposerBar ISO modal (line 326) has Discogs search with data-testid='iso-discogs-search', results have data-testid='iso-discogs-result-{discogs_id}', manual entry button data-testid='iso-manual-entry-btn'. ISOPage listing modal has Discogs picker, condition select, and photo upload. /trades route redirects to /honeypot - trade details are viewed as modals within pages.

propose_trade_modal.button_validation: Disabled until record + condition + >=1 photo selected

endpoints: GET /api/trades/{id} - full detail with condition/photos for both records
GET /api/discogs/search - returns results with cover_url, discogs_id
